# Copilot Instructions

- This project is Kizashi Notes, a seed-based creative memo app.
- Treat notes as seeds that can grow, resurface, and connect.
- Keep the UX calm, simple, and low-pressure.
- Do not turn this into a generic task manager.
- Follow docs/phase-roadmap.md and docs/mvp.md.
- Before implementation, read docs/phase-roadmap.md and docs/mvp.md, and stay inside the current phase scope.
- Do not add AI API calls, auth, billing, or cloud dependencies unless a later phase explicitly asks for it.
- Never commit secrets.
- Prefer small, reviewable changes.
